response.justification: While the candidate brings valuable geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective and Green Map, the stale C++ skills (last significant work in 2015, 11 years ago) and lack of modern systems programming background pose substantial risk for a role requiring C++ as the primary language. Current focus on TypeScript/Node.js web development does not demonstrate the low-level optimization and distributed systems expertise critical for routing data pipeline engineering.
strengths: Extensive geospatial domain expertise through GISCollective platform and Green Map GIS applications
Proven software craftsmanship with consistent TDD focus and quality-first approach across roles
Demonstrated ability to learn and ship complex systems across diverse technical domains (D, Java, Node.js, C++)
concerns: C++ experience is 11 years stale (last significant work at National Instruments in 2015); current expertise is TypeScript/Node.js web stack
No Rust experience and career trajectory (web/full-stack) does not demonstrate low-level systems programming or performance optimization background
No specific experience with routing or navigation guidance systems; GIS domain differs from routing data pipeline requirements

key_factors.factor: C++ skill currency and systems programming depth
Software engineering discipline and code quality practices
